narrative_summary: - User invoked the `dagster-expert` skill to create a new dbt component named `acme_dbt` pointing to the `https://github.com/dagster-io/jaffle_shop` GitHub repo
- Skill loaded its system prompt and reference index from the dagster-expert skill directory

- Read `references/integrations/INDEX.md` to find the dagster-dbt integration, then `references/integrations/dagster-dbt/INDEX.md` to navigate the decision tree (scaffolding a new component → `scaffolding.md`)
- Read `references/cli/scaffold/defs.md` and `references/integrations/dagster-dbt/scaffolding.md` for exact CLI syntax
- Ran `uv add dagster-dbt` to install the integration dependency
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold defs dagster_dbt.DbtProjectComponent acme_dbt --git-url https://github.com/dagster-io/jaffle_shop` to scaffold the component from the remote git repo
- Identified that jaffle_shop uses DuckDB as its adapter (required to compile the dbt manifest), ran `uv add dbt-duckdb`
- Ran `uv run dg list defs` to verify — all 8 dbt model assets loaded successfully along with 20 asset checks from dbt tests
